_meta.notes: Elevated offers expire fast. Refresh weekly. Each entry should record the channel (Resy / CardMatch / NLL email / referral / public-incognito) so the agent knows how to direct the user to it. Public-elevated offers (occasionally Chase pushes 100K SUBs publicly) go here too with channel='public_elevated'.

offers.channel_url_pattern: Resy iOS app -> Offers tab; or resy.com/cards if signed in
offers.notes: Resy targeted offers rotate. Expiration date is estimated; offer link itself shows the real expiry. The 'wording omits lifetime language' is the key flag — when true, repeat-SUB-eligible users can earn the bonus despite holding the card before.

offers.channel_url_pattern: https://cardmatch.creditcards.com/ -> enter SSN -> check Amex tile
offers.notes: CardMatch shows targeted offers per user. 250K is the high end; some users see 200K, others 150K. Always check personally before recommending.
Recurring Resy offer ~quarterly. Watch for it.
Public 100K appears 1-2x per year. When live, replaces the standard 75K offer. Check the application page to verify.
